text: The subject is located in the rural community of Towanda, IL. It is a single family detached one-and-a-half story traditional designed house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the community in design, quality, and condition. Towanda, IL is considered a bedroom community and most residents commute to Bloomington-Normal or farm local land for employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Jackson St, to the South by Hely St, to the East by farmland, and to the West by I-55.
